name: Binding Run
summary: Export approved content to distributable formats
purpose: Assemble a player-safe export view from a Canon snapshot. Package manuscript, codex, and optional assets without leaking spoilers or internal plumbing.
description: Binding Run is the export loop. Book Binder packages what exists—no rewrites, no content changes. The focus is on integrity (all links resolve), presentation safety (no internals leak), and clear provenance (snapshot ID and options stamped). If issues are found, they're routed upstream via hooks. The output is a distributable bundle plus view log and build manifest.

triggers.condition: Milestone release (chapter, act, or full book)
Playtest build needed for narration dry-run

optional_artifacts.description: Latest Gatekeeper report for presentation safety notes

context_requirements: Current Gatekeeper notes on presentation safety

required_artifacts.description: Complete build record with integrity report

optional_artifacts.description: Hooks for broken links, missing content, or label issues

context_requirements: Front matter with snapshot ID, options, and coverage

configuration.name: Configuration
configuration.purpose: Confirm snapshot selection and export options with Showrunner

confirm_snapshot.action: Verify the Canon snapshot ID and ensure it exists and is accessible.
confirm_snapshot.guidance: Confirm the exact snapshot identifier. Do not proceed with Hot content or mixed snapshots.

confirm_options.action: Review and confirm export options: formats, art/audio inclusion, languages, print-friendly layout.
confirm_options.guidance: Get explicit confirmation from Showrunner on options. Default to conservative choices if unclear.

integrity_check.name: Integrity Check
integrity_check.purpose: Validate all links, anchors, and references before assembly

run_integrity_check.action: Scan the snapshot for broken links, orphan pages, missing alt text, and unresolved codex references.
run_integrity_check.guidance: Use validate_only mode first. Document all issues before proceeding. Critical issues should block assembly.

create_upstream_hooks.action: Create hook cards for issues that require upstream fixes.
create_upstream_hooks.guidance: Do not fix content in the binding step. Create hooks for Scene Smith (broken anchors), Codex Curator (missing entries), or Style Lead (label issues).

completion_criteria: Decision made: proceed with warnings or abort

on_failure.message: Critical integrity failures. Create hooks and await upstream fixes before re-running.

assembly.name: Assembly
assembly.purpose: Generate the export bundle in requested formats

assemble_bundle.action: Run the full export assembly for all requested formats.
assemble_bundle.guidance: Use the assemble_export tool with confirmed configuration. Ensure all formats complete successfully.

create_build_manifest.action: Create the build manifest with full configuration, integrity report, and output references.
create_build_manifest.guidance: Include all technical details: hashes, paths, coverage percentages, warnings.

create_view_log.action: Create the player-safe view log entry.
create_view_log.guidance: Include only player-safe information: snapshot ID, options summary, coverage, known limitations. No internal details.

completion_criteria: Build manifest created with full details
View log created with player-safe summary

spot_check.name: Spot Check
spot_check.purpose: Final presentation safety and integrity verification

gatekeeper_spot_check.action: Quick spot-check on Presentation Safety, Integrity (links), and Style (labels/captions).
gatekeeper_spot_check.guidance: Focus on player-facing surfaces. Check front matter, navigation labels, and any captions. Flag but do not block unless critical.

completion_criteria: No critical presentation or integrity issues

on_success.message: Export bundle ready. View log and build manifest created. Handoff to Showrunner for distribution.

on_failure.message: Spot check found issues. Document and re-run assembly if fixes are minor, or create hooks for upstream teams.
